'''Surron'''<ref name="FC" /> was a world located in the [[Surron sector/Legends|Surron sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the homeworld of the [[Surronian (species)|Surronians]], an insectoid species<ref name="FC" /> with a guild-based society.<ref name="TEGtVaV">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> The Surronian were long-respected shipbuilders,<ref name="SS">''[[Stock Ships]]''</ref> renowned for their innovative starship designs.<ref name="FC" /> The [[Surron system/Legends|Surron system]] hosted [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]]<ref name="TEGtW" /> and Surron was the headquarters of the shipwright [[Surron StarTech]].<ref name="FC" />
